description: With our security_mcp, you can easily identify vulnerabilities in your code by leveraging the OSV.dev database. For just $0.01 per call, developers can ensure their applications are secure and compliant, making it an essential tool for DevOps teams and security analysts alike. Whether you’re using npm, PyPI, or Go, our service provides instant insights into potential risks. Start with a free health check to ensure your code's baseline security is intact!
